title: [Handshake] Canonicalize away simple mux+cbranch structures
body:
In the following case, the output of the mux can only ever be the data input to the conditional branch.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16338943/149669593-52977f7b-0887-45c7-b6e1-262bacd20e0e.png)

Canonicalizing this structure results in the removal of a mux, a cbranch, and two fork outputs(!).
